title: Building Europe’s circular economy on what already works [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As the EU advances the Circular Economy Act, policymakers should prioritise harmonisation and ambitious collection systems, building on Europe's world-leading and unique paper and cardboard recycling model.
summary_public: As the EU advances the Circular Economy Act, policymakers should prioritise harmonisation and ambitious collection systems, building on Europe's world-leading and unique paper and cardboard recycling model.
